dict.string: FitComp needs access to your step count to track your progress in challenges and display your activity on leaderboards.
FitComp needs permission to save your step data for challenge tracking and progress updates.
FitComp needs access to your camera to take transformation photos and document your fitness journey.
FitComp needs access to your photo library to select transformation photos.
FitComp needs permission to save transformation photos to your photo library.
